title: consolida orientalis var. hispanica
intro: Consolida orientalis var. hispanica, also known as Spanish cornflower, is a perennial plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Consolida orientalis var. hispanica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally to support overall health and well-being.
